response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and cloud-related technologies, with a strong background in C++ and leadership roles. However, his experience is more focused on web/mobile applications and embedded systems rather than large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His lack of explicit production-level cloud architecture experience and limited tenure in leadership roles (only ~2 years in a staff engineer position) slightly weakens his fit for the technical leadership role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (10+ years) with low-latency and high-performance systems
Proven track record in building scalable infrastructure (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes)
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and engineering best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure) as a primary focus
No explicit mention of managing large, ambiguous technical projects from end-to-end
Short tenure in leadership roles (only ~2 years as Staff Engineer at re:cinq)
